Name: Check Point Cyberint Premium IOC
Author: Cyberint - support@checkpoint.com
Description: Cyberint, a Check Point company, provides Microsoft Sentinel integration to streamline premium IOC ingestion and bring enriched threat intelligence from the Infinity External Risk Management solution into Microsoft Sentinel. The Premium IOC connector incrementally pulls high-fidelity indicators — IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes — enriched with confidence, severity, malicious classification, kill-chain stage, blocking and uniqueness flags, malware types, and CVE/campaign associations.
